item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, declining by 1.92% on the day and a sharper 3.56% over the past five days. This downturn reflects a broad-based sell-off with defensive and cyclical stocks showing contrasting fortunes, while heavyweight movers have influenced the overall market tone. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a notable downturn on 9 Mar 2026, declining by 2.11% in a single session and registering a sharper 3.59% fall over the past five trading days. This performance contrasts with the broader market’s mixed trends and highlights the mounting pressure on mid-sized companies amid current market conditions. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Slumps Nearly 1.8% Amid Broad-Based Sector Declines and Elevated Volatility
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp sell-off on 9 March 2026, with the Sensex closing down 1.8% at 77,498.72 after a volatile session. Despite an initial steep fall of over 1,860 points, the benchmark index staged a partial recovery but remained firmly in the red, reflecting persistent investor caution amid rising volatility and broad-based sector weakness. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 2.71% on the day and registering a sharper 3.78% fall over the past five trading sessions. This performance contrasts with its recent reputation as a market outperformer, highlighting growing investor caution amid sectoral pressures and weak breadth indicators. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat State Petronet Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Gujarat State Petronet Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 9 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 270.55, down 7.91% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market amid heightened volatility and negative market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Bharat Forge Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 Mar 2026
item.description: Bharat Forge Ltd. experienced a notable intraday decline on 9 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,811, down 5.85% from previous levels. The stock’s performance today reflected broader market pressures as well as sector-specific headwinds, resulting in a sharper fall than the benchmark Sensex. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sancode Technologies Ltd Stock Hits All-Time High at ₹241.7
item.description: Sancode Technologies Ltd, a key player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has reached a significant milestone by hitting a new all-time high of Rs.241.7. This achievement underscores the company’s robust performance and sustained price momentum over recent periods. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: EMS Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.258.8 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: EMS Ltd’s share price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.258.8 today, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting persistent pressures on the company’s financial performance and market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sapphire Foods India Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Sapphire Foods India Ltd has plunged to a new all-time low of Rs.177, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock’s performance continues to lag considerably behind the broader market and its sector peers, reflecting persistent difficulties across multiple financial metrics and valuation indicators. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Tyroon Tea Company Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.82
item.description: Tyroon Tea Company Ltd’s stock touched a new 52-week low of Rs.82 today, marking a significant decline amid ongoing financial headwinds and subdued market sentiment. Despite a slight intraday recovery, the stock remains below all key moving averages, reflecting persistent downward pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: PG Electroplast Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 Mar 2026
item.description: PG Electroplast Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 9 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 528.3, down 13.11% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and persistent downward pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Time Technoplast Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 Mar 2026
item.description: Time Technoplast Ltd. experienced a significant intraday decline on 9 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 164.15 as the stock faced notable price pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Unichem Laboratories Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.309.4
item.description: Unichem Laboratories Ltd’s shares declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.309.4 on 9 March 2026, marking a significant downturn amid broader market weakness and company-specific headwinds. The stock underperformed its sector and key indices, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial health and recent quarterly results. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Petronet LNG Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 March 2026
item.description: Petronet LNG Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 274.05, down 5.47% from its previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid widespread selling pressure and negative sentiment prevailing in the indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: PC Jeweller Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.8.65 Amid Market Downturn
item.description: PC Jeweller Ltd’s shares declined sharply to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.8.65 on 9 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s downward trajectory amid broader market pressures and sectoral weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Jindal Stainless Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 Mar 2026
item.description: Jindal Stainless Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 710.8, reflecting a 5.41% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral downturns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd experienced a notable decline today, hitting an intraday low of Rs 284.1, down 10.42% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting immediate selling pressure and subdued market sentiment within the specialty chemicals space. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: REC Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 9 March 2026
item.description: REC Ltd experienced significant intraday weakness on 9 Mar 2026, touching a new 52-week low of Rs 322.2 as the stock faced pronounced selling pressure amid broader market declines and sector underperformance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: TransIndia Real Estate Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.22.05
item.description: TransIndia Real Estate Ltd’s stock declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.22.05 on 9 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in its recent price trajectory. This new low reflects ongoing pressures within the transport services sector and broader market conditions, as the stock continues to trade below all major moving averages. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Oil & Natural Gas Corporation Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Oil & Natural Gas Corporation Ltd. (ONGC) experienced a notable intraday decline on 09 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 268.85, down 3.6% from its previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid widespread selling pressure and a subdued market environment. Time: 1 hour ago
